body_transformation: The rounded head retains its pointed ears and low stance, now with molten gold fur texture along the ear edges and ember-scaled armor plating covering the compact body. The leaf-like back appendage transforms into a volcanic basalt bulb with glowing crimson fissures and ember sparks, while the curled tail tip gains a flame-tipped glow with smoke trails emerging from its spiral. Deep obsidian scales replace the light green body coloration, featuring charcoal black heat-haze distortion along the joints and molten gold accents on the legs. Red eyes with white highlights now pulse with amber glow, maintaining their structural position on the rounded head.
signature_feature: Back bulb: volcanic basalt with glowing crimson fissures and ember sparks.
